extracted_json.title: Step 2: Create a Plan

items.text: whom am I ? : perhaps an engineer or a marketing analyst at a cell-phone company like Apple, Samsung, ...
who is the solution for : for the new product development team, ..., CTO, CEO
which type (manufacturer) of cell-phones should I (you) focus on : OBVIOUS ("Be practical")
how cell-phones work ⇒ functions & customer needs of cell-phones, & how they are realized (made real) or FORM ("HOW STUFFWORKS.COM")

extracted_json.summary_topic_line: Step 2 of a problem-solving process: creating a plan via assumptions and information needs.
extracted_json.summary_gist: Notes outline Step 2 (Create a Plan) of a problem-solving framework applied to cell-phone design. Part (a) lists assumptions: identifying who you are (an engineer or marketing analyst at a company like Apple or Samsung), who the solution is for (new product development team, CTO, CEO), and which type/manufacturer of cell-phone to focus on (be practical). Part (b) identifies needed information: how cell-phones work (functions, customer needs, and how they are realized as FORM, referencing HowStuffWorks.com) and other unspecified information.

transcription:
Step 2 :   Create a  PLAN

(a)  Assumptions
      whom am I ? : perhaps an engineer or
                        a marketing analyst at
                        a cell-phone company like
                        Apple, Samsung, ...

      who is the solution for : for the new product
                                  development team, ...,
                                  CTO, CEO

      which type (manufacturer) }  :  OBVIOUS
      of cell-phones should         ("Be practical")
      I (you) focus on

(b)  What information do I need ?
      - how cell-phones work ⇒ functions &
                                  customer needs of
      ("HOW STUFFWORKS.COM")      cell-phones, &
                                  how they are
                                  realized (made
                                  real) or FORM

      - other (?)
